title: Momonosuke Faces Wano’s Future
description: On pages 23–26, this part focuses on Unknown person #21, Unknown person #22, Queen, Unknown person #23, Unknown person #24, Sanji as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Queen
dialogue.text: So this is Sanji Sweetie's attack cuisine!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It wouldn't look even a tiny bit out of place next to the dishes of the Queendom's greatest chefs!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The richness and nutrition of the offal is seeing into our every cell!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the tender, meaty goodness of the pork is wonderfully filling!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You know, isn't a man who can cook the sex/est thing?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: You can feel how caring he is!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: If you flash that boyish smile now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...The contrast to your usual mature look will make my little heart go, pitter-patter!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 20 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
